core_loop: The player explores the open world of Optiopia, interacts with NPCs, fights monsters, completes quests, and collects ingredients to create superior dishes for the gods.

rules: Players can choose between sword, wand, or bow as their starting weapon.
Combat involves managing HP and MP while selecting actions to defeat enemies.

starting_options.name: Warrior
starting_options.description: A strong and resilient fighter equipped with a sword.

starting_options.name: Mage
starting_options.description: A powerful spellcaster using the might of magic through a wand.

starting_options.name: Ranger
starting_options.description: An agile archer skilled in ranged combat with a bow.

enemies.name: Orc
enemies.behavior: Charges towards the nearest player and attempts to grapple them.

enemies.name: Witch
enemies.behavior: Casts spells that reduce player stats before attacking.

difficulty_scaling: Enemies' stats increase linearly with the player's level, ensuring a balanced challenge throughout the game.
